# A3D Built-in Asset Pack

This directory contains selected asset files from the A3D project for the
optional built-in 3D director stage asset pack.

- Source repository: https://github.com/n0neye/A3D
- Source commit: fc396833aebcb4fea785c587caad1b314f6cf8f8
- Upstream license: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0
- License copy: `LICENSE-AGPL-3.0.txt`

Included asset groups:

- Character models: Lily, Xbot, Mannequin.
- Character animation / pose FBX files used as pose presets.
- Skybox / HDRI preview and background images.

Excluded from this pack:

- A3D application source code.
- A3D geometry / shape panel resources.
- A3D render, ComfyUI, or Fal integration code.

The Storyboard Copilot implementation rewrites the director stage code inside
this project and references these files only as bundled assets.
